title: Notifications - Master Toggle OFF - Update failed
scenario: No notification shown on firmware update failure when Notifications master toggle is disabled in App Settings > General > Notifications & Device Alerts
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Navigate to App Settings → General → Notifications & Device Alerts.
3. Set the Notifications master toggle to OFF.
4. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected to the app.
5. Initiate a firmware update (DFU) on the connected device.
6. During the firmware update, turn off the Poly Bluetooth audio device (e.g., press and hold the Power button to power it off) to cause the update to fail.
7. Observe the app and device for any notification pop-up indicating the firmware update failure.
expected: No notification pop-up is shown upon firmware update failure when the Notifications master toggle is disabled.
